scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited scalable-board viewport phase adds BoardWorldViewportController, changing the project runtime class count from 142 to 143. The complete 231-test suite retains the same reviewed Godot 4.7/GUT exit counts as the prior board-editor phase: ObjectDB=288, Resources=128, TextureStorage=10, ShapedText=2, and Font=3. The pinned GF 8.1.0 vendor tree is unchanged.
